title: Fresh Animations Fix for Horse Armor Stand Mod
description: Compatibility fix between Fresh Animations Extension and Horse Armor Stand
body:
This resource pack will add compatibilty between Fresh Animations Extension and Horse Armor Stand mod by using the horse model from Fresh Animations Extension and making the texture for the armor stand compatible with the model.

![Model and texture fix, before and after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a53bfbedc1278283361718d6ca1d63ab9c98874b.jpeg)
Model and texture fix, before and after.

All rights and credits belongs to the original creators of these mods.

[Horse Armor Stand](https://modrinth.com/mod/horse-armor-stand) - by hierodrimm

[Fresh Animations - Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) - by FreshLX
